Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: 1.  **Understand User Input:** - **Part 1: Normative Process Behavior (Strict Rules):** Defines a strict sequence for a loan application process. - Sequence: Application Received → Credit Check → Risk Assessment → Loan Decision → Inform Applicant → [If Approved: Finalize Documentation] → Close Case - Ordering Rules: Credit Check before Risk Assessment; Risk Assessment before Loan Decision; Inform Applicant after Loan Decision; If Approved, Finalize Documentation before Close Case; If Rejected, No Finalize Doc. - **Part 2: Desiderata (Recommended but Not Strict):** Timing recommendations (Credit Check within 24h of application, Inform Applicant within 48h of decision) and optional Follow-up Call before closing. - **Event Log:** Three cases with timestamps and activities. - **Task:** 1. Identify cases violating normative rules and explain reasons. 2. Identify cases failing desiderata conditions... 3. Suggest interpretations or justifications...

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: 2.  **Analyze Case 1:** - Timestamps & Activities: 09:00 App Received, 09:30 Credit Check, 10:00 Risk Assessment, 11:00 Loan Decision (Approved), 13:00 Inform Applicant, 13:30 Finalize Documentation, 14:00 Close Case - Check Normative Rules: Sequence matches exactly. Order: CC before RA? Yes. RA before LD? Yes. Inform after LD? Yes. Approved → Finalize before Close? Yes. - **Normative Violation?** None. - Check Desiderata: CC within 24h? Yes. Inform within 48h? Yes. Follow-up Call? Not mentioned, but optional. - **Desiderata Violation?** None.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: 3.  **Analyze Case 2:** - Timestamps & Activities: 08:00 App Received, 08:20 Risk Assessment (No prior Credit Check), 09:00 Credit Check, 09:30 Loan Decision (Rejected), 10:00 Finalize Documentation (Not allowed after rejection), 10:30 Close Case - Check Normative Rules: Risk Assessment before Credit Check. Violates Credit Check must occur before Risk Assessment. Rejected, but Finalize Documentation occurred. Violates If rejected, do not finalize documentation. Inform Applicant missing. Violates strict sequence. - **Normative Violations?** Yes. Multiple: 1) RA before CC, 2) Missing Inform Applicant, 3) Finalized documentation after rejection.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: 4.  **Analyze Case 3:** - Timestamps & Activities: 09:00 (Jan 12) App Received, 10:00 (Jan 14) Credit Check (>24h), 11:00 Risk Assessment, 12:00 Loan Decision (Approved), 15:00 (Jan 16) Inform Applicant (>48h), 09:00 (Jan 17) Finalize Documentation, 10:00 Close Case, No Follow-up Call - Check Normative Rules: Sequence matches. Order correct. Approved → Finalize before Close. - **Normative Violation?** None. - Check Desiderata: CC ~49 hours >24h. Inform ~51 hours >48h. Missing Follow-up. - **Desiderata Violations?** Yes. Timing delays and missing follow-up.

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: 5.  **Structure the Response:** - **Part 1: Normative Rule Violations** Case 1: Compliant, Case 2: Violates..., Case 3: Compliant - **Part 2: Desiderata Deviations** Case 1: Compliant, Case 2: N/A..., Case 3: Violates timing... - **Part 3: Interpretations/Justifications** Provide plausible reasons... Case 2: system error..., Case 3: high volume, weekend... General: Suggest process improvements.

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: 6.  **Draft Response (Mental Refinement):** **3. Interpretations & Justifications:** - *Case 2 (Normative Violations):* reordering... possibly due to staff inexperience, system bypass... Finalizing... template error... Missing Inform... compliance gap... - *Case 3 (Desiderata Deviations):* timing delays... external dependencies (e.g., credit bureau... weekend)... absence of follow-up... resource prioritization... justifiable as operational trade-offs... - *General Recommendations:* implement system-level sequence locks...

Name: Validation - PE
Text: 7.  **Self-Correction/Verification during drafting:** - Check timestamps for Case 3: Jan 12 09:00 to Jan 14 10:00 ~49 hours. Correct. Jan 14 12:00 to Jan 16 15:00 ~51 hours. Correct. - Normative rules for Case 2: RA before CC violation confirmed. Inform missing confirmed. Finalize after reject confirmed. - Desiderata: timings and follow-up. Correct. - Task 3: frame justifications carefully... - Structure matches 3 tasks. All constraints addressed.
